---
name: Bug report
about: Report a crash, wrong behavior, or editor error
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug description
A clear, short description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. …
2. …
3. …

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened (e.g. crash, wrong result, error message).

## Environment
- **Unreal Engine version:** (e.g. 5.6)
- **Blueprint Insight version:** (e.g. 1.0 — from Plugins → Blueprint Insight or .uplugin)
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, Mac, Linux)
- **Project:** (e.g. blank project, or “our game project”)

## Additional context
Logs, screenshots, or a minimal repro project if relevant.
